|         ^         |
|         |         |
|    +----+----+    |
|    |  Parse  |    |
|    +---------+    |
|         ^         |
|         |         |
|         |         |
|  Processing       |
+---------------o---+
          +-----+
          |
          |
          |
          |
          |
          |
          |
          |
          |
          |
+---------o---------+
|         |         |
|         |         |
|  +------+-----+   |
|  |  Validate  |   |
|  +------------+   |
|         ^         |
|         |         |
|    +----+----+    |
|    |  Login  |    |
|    +---------+    |
|                   |
|  Authentication   |
+-------------------+
